rag_rules: Assume and guarantee statements must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Validator diagnostics pointing to implementation-level references in type annexes indicate invalid contract placement
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must reside in valid component type scopes for port-based assumptions and guarantees
Implementation-level bindings should be moved to implementation annexes when valid
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type contracts may only reference visible features, not subcomponent paths
anti_patterns: Placing assume/guarantee statements in component implementation annexes instead of type annexes
Referencing implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
AGREE constants and equation declarations in implementation scope
